name: deskmd
description: A lightweight Markdown editor for macOS.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check scripts/ux-smoke-test.js && node --check scripts/topbar-visual-test.js && node --check scripts/generate-app-icon.js && bash -n scripts/build-macos-app.sh
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run build:mac && npm run test:ux && npm run test:topbar

author: Junyoung Kang
